description: Rahul Gandhi paid tribute to his father, former Prime Minister Rajiv Gandhi, on his 35th death anniversary, vowing to fulfill his vision for a strong and prosperous India. Senior Congress leaders also paid homage at Vir Bhumi, remembering Rajiv Gandhi's contributions to modernizing India through technological and educational reforms.

Tamil Nadu cabinet gets bigger under Vijay; Congress returns after nearly six decades
description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay is set to expand his cabinet, inducting 23 MLAs, including two from the Congress party, marking their return after 60 years. The Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK) and IUML are also expected to join the council of ministers soon.

title: Delhi double murder: Woman, teen son killed; cash, jewellery stolen in robbery
description: A shocking double murder has occurred in Govindpuri, Delhi. A 38-year-old woman, Sharda Sahu, and her 13-year-old son were found stabbed to death. The incident took place in the early hours of Thursday. Police suspect a robbery as cash and jewellery are missing. Investigations are underway to apprehend the culprits.

description: Prashant Kishor has relocated to a Patna ashram until the Bihar assembly polls, aiming for his Jan Suraaj Party to make an impact after a previous electoral setback. He criticized Chief Minister Nitish Kumar's son's cabinet induction and urged voters to prioritize their future over caste or monetary inducements, warning of potential economic challenges from West Asian conflicts.

Rs 600 crore rail land, Eid fears: Why Mumbai eviction drive turned chaotic
description: Western Railway commenced a massive anti-encroachment drive at Garib Nagar, Mumbai, demolishing hundreds of structures near Bandra station to reclaim valuable railway land. The operation, aimed at facilitating railway expansion, faced resistance and violence, resulting in injuries and detentions. Residents allege inadequate rehabilitation and express distress over demolitions preceding Eid.

title: 'We could have handled it better': Tamim Iqbal on Bangladesh’s T20 WC pull out
description: Former Bangladesh captain Tamim Iqbal opens up on his transition into cricket administration after a heart attack, Bangladesh’s fast bowling rise, the future of India-Bangladesh relations, the growing influence of T20 leagues. Bangladesh Cricket Board's interim president also shares his vision to restore Bangladesh cricket’s reputation, which has taken a beating after they decided to pull out from the T20 World Cup.

Digital gold and ETFs are gaining traction alongside traditional jewellery.  Gold remains a symbol of prosperity, security, and auspiciousness for Indians across generations.

title: 42 aircraft, over $29 billion: What Trump’s Iran operation cost the US military
description: Operation Epic Fury, initiated under the leadership of Donald Trump, saw the U.S. military suffer grave losses, with 42 aircraft—comprising fighter jets and drones—sustaining damage or being lost entirely. This aggressive strike prompted swift and vigorous reprisal from Iran, bringing the region to a boiling point.

title: Jeff Bezos favored to buy Seahawks from Microsoft co-founder’s estate
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos is projected as the leading buyer for the Seattle Seahawks. The NFL team was owned by late former Microsoft co-founder Paul Allen. After his passing in 2018, it is now managed by her sister Jody Allen under the Paul G. Allen Trust. It is now officially up for sale. Jeff Bezos has shown interest in owning a local NFL franchise for over seven years. The sale process is expected to conclude by the 2026 offseason.

title: TCS clarifies gratuity exclusion, says employees will see no reduction in pay
description: TCS employees are reacting to appraisal letters, with some reporting lower take-home salaries due to changes in compensation structure and the exclusion of gratuity from CTC. The IT giant denies any reduction in gross or net pay, stating the revised framework aligns with new labour codes and aims to protect employee earnings while enhancing tax efficiency.

title: Meet Mbah Sadiman: Man who sold his goats to transform barren hills into forest
Ronda Rousey’s net worth 2026: Earnings, endorsements and lifestyle
description: Ronda Rousey, a trailblazer in combat sports, is projected to have a net worth of nearly $14 million by 2026. Her fortune stems from lucrative UFC and WWE careers, acting, endorsements, and book sales. Rousey's impact on women's MMA and her transition to WWE cemented her status as a crossover star, ensuring her continued relevance and earning potential.
